Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="hid2715 kommunemal templsetid9 pagelevel0 page521660 ppt521660 pagelogo frontpage pgn_hjem articlelisting hassubmenuitem langno mofebruar AAAA"> <a class="show-for-sr show-on-focus rs_ski
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '197537' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

MODERATE

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" id="frontpageinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)

MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbfaaname' missing autocomplete attribute

Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>

Start your heading structure with h1

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>

Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Start your heading structure with h1

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/reglementer-for-kommunestyret-formannskapet-og-politiske-utvalgraad.607791.no.html?showtipform=2#t
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/b240a10c-7de3-4af7-8d50-8c73afd457d0" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring/Beasatlašvuođajulggaštus</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebeefbname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebeefbname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Link text has redundant phrase: 'klikk her for å lese forklaring til forskriften'

<a href="https://www.bergen.kommune.no/bk/multimedia/archive/00305/Forskrift_forklarin_305191a.pdf">klikk her for å lese forklaring til forskriften</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Reglementer - NESSEBY KOMMUNE

https://www.nesseby.kommune.no/reglementer.600038.no.html
Avvik: 235 | Bestått: 279
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '197537' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el197537_0" name="197537" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="392052"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '197539' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el197539_0" name="197539" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="392054"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation-mobile rs_skip"> <ul class="vertical menu mobilemenu menulevel0" id="mobilemenuone"> <li class="menuitem itemlvlnum2 menulevel1 menu521684 menu521684" data-cat="521684" id=

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/b240a10c-7de3-4af7-8d50-8c73afd457d0" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring/Beasatlašvuođajulggaštus</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebaffdname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebaffdname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Tjenester i hjemmet - NESSEBY KOMMUNE

https://www.nesseby.kommune.no/tjenester-i-hjemmet.528746.no.html
Avvik: 245 | Bestått: 306
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '197537' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el197537_0" name="197537" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="392052"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '197539' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el197539_0" name="197539" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="392054"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/b240a10c-7de3-4af7-8d50-8c73afd457d0" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring/Beasatlašvuođajulggaštus</a>

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebfaecname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebfaecname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 0.5rem; padding: 0px; color: inherit; text-rendering: optimizelegibility; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.4;"><span style="font-size:18px;"><span st
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<input id="el197537_0" name="197537" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="392052"/>

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

<svg class="shareoniconsvg shareoniconsvg-printlink" height="24" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><path d="M18
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '197537' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el197537_0" name="197537" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="392052"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '197539' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el197539_0" name="197539" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="392054"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="filelink" href="/getfile.php/5474744.2715.jimnlzp77wuinw/Handlings-+og+%C3%B8konomiplan+Nesseby+kommune++2026-29+versjon+15.1.pdf" target="_blank">Se på / Last ned</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.nesseby.kommune.no%2Fbudsjett-oekonomiplan-og-rapportering.581745.no.html"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/budsjett-oekonomiplan-og-rapportering.581745.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Ti
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/b240a10c-7de3-4af7-8d50-8c73afd457d0" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring/Beasatlašvuođajulggaštus</a>

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebffbaname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebffbaname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
